nasb.text: Then for the unclean person they shall take some of the ashes of the burnt purification from sin and flowing water shall be added to them in a vessel.

esv.text: For the unclean they shall take some ashes of the burnt sin offering, and fresh water shall be added in a vessel.

cnv.text: 人要為這不潔淨的人，拿些燒成的除罪灰，放在器皿裡，倒上活水。

ccb.text: 要拿些除罪用的红母牛灰，放在器皿里，倒上清水，
